title: AdversarialDebate Input
description: Validated inputs for adversarial-debate skill execution

topic.description: The decision question being debated — must be a clear, answerable question

proStance.description: The position the PRO agent will advocate for

conStance.description: The position the CON agent will argue for (the alternative or opposing view)

rounds.description: Number of debate rounds to run (1-5, default 3)

context.description: Optional background context about the system, team, or constraints relevant to the decision

successCriteria.description: Optional description of what a good recommendation looks like for this specific decision
